artifact: T4 dedup walkthrough decisions (design doc D6)
decided_by: Daniel Feder (user), live walkthrough with Claude (Fable) per D4; AI deck recommendations were the starting point, every verdict user-confirmed

verdict_key.retire_duplicate: true copy set: survivors stay live, retired[] get retired_at + retired_reason=dedup:<group_id>
verdict_key.keep_family: genuinely different lessons kept for the post-sprint families project (family_label records how they relate); retired[] non-empty when an exact-copy pair was embedded in the family
verdict_key.unrelated: false positive — no action, kept for the record
